evidence_gaps: No arxiv paper presents a deployed, end-to-end China-VI remote emission monitoring system with OBD telematics + cloud platform; this is the exact gap the thesis fills.
Crossref returns 8 candidate papers but none provide open datasets, code, or replication packages; reuse is documentation-level only.
No GitHub repos returned — student must search CNKI/Wanfang/SAE for Chinese-language OBD remote monitoring code or open CAN-bus datasets (e.g., mee.gov.cn remote OBD platform docs).
OpenAlex returned zero results; the back-end likely has limited coverage of Chinese-language energy/transport compliance literature, biasing the result set toward English-language works.

miss: Heavy-duty diesel engine OBD remote diagnostics framework
Remote OBD monitoring for compliance reporting
